m2.environment.CfnAbout: Specifies a runtime environment for a given runtime engine.

m2.environment.Description.Description: The description of the runtime environment.

m2.environment.EngineType.Description: The target platform for the runtime environment.

m2.environment.EngineVersion.Description: The version of the runtime engine.

m2.environment.HighAvailabilityConfig.Description: Defines the details of a high availability configuration.

m2.environment.InstanceType.Description: The instance type of the runtime environment.

m2.environment.KmsKeyId.Description: The identifier of a customer managed key.

m2.environment.Name.Description: The name of the runtime environment.

m2.environment.PreferredMaintenanceWindo.Description: Configures the maintenance window that you want for the runtime environment. The maintenance window must have the format `ddd:hh24:mi-ddd:hh24:mi` and must be less than 24 hours. The following two examples are valid maintenance windows: `sun:23:45-mon:00:15` or `sat:01:00-sat:03:00`.   If you do not provide a value, a random system-generated value will be assigned.

m2.environment.PubliclyAccessible.Description: Specifies whether the runtime environment is publicly accessible.

m2.environment.SecurityGroupIds.Description: The list of security groups for the VPC associated with this runtime environment.

m2.environment.StorageConfigurations.Description: Defines the storage configuration for a runtime environment.

m2.environment.SubnetIds.Description: The list of subnets associated with the VPC for this runtime environment.

m2.environment.Tags.Description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).
